segments.text: But man, this is looking scary! Really scary!
segments.original_text: だがもういろいろ怖いいろいろ怖い

segments.text: Goes to the ledge, edge-traps the neutral getup with forward tilt!
segments.original_text: 崖に一旦行くがその場上がりを横強で狩って

full_text: But man, this is looking scary! Really scary! Goes to the ledge, edge-traps the neutral getup with forward tilt!

corrections.original: その場を横強で勝って
corrections.corrected: その場上がりを横強で狩って
